text: hey, I cant access my account, it says my password is wrong but I know its correct. I think there might be a glitch or something.
I applied for a refund due to a billing error. The transaction was completed over a month ago, but I haven't seen any updates. Can you please expedite this process? It's quite urgent.

I've been trying to use the app, but it keeps telling me there's no internet connection. My Wi-Fi is working perfectly with other devices, so I don't understand what the issue is. It's so frustrating!

Quick question—do you know if the subscription includes access to beta features? I read some forum posts but they were all over the place. Really confusing stuff, some said yes, some said no. Anyway, just wondering. Thanks.
I can't log into my account because I forgot my password but the reset link isn't working.

I'm trying to log into my account, but my password is apparently wrong. I even checked it a billion times and it's the same one I've used forever. Can you believe it? Oh, and by the way, my cat just knocked over my coffee. Not that it matters, but what a day!
I really need to understand what's going on! One moment my account was fine, and now I'm getting messages that it's suspended. Can you explain this confusing situation to me?
I ordered a dress for my daughter’s birthday party, but only the shoes arrived. This is so disappointing, especially since the party is tomorrow. Please issue a refund for the dress I never received.
I received the wrong item in my order and would like to request a full refund. Please let me know the next steps to proceed with this issue.
I'm really concerned about the latest update. Is there any specific reason why the app started crashing every time I try to access my profile? It's quite frustrating and I'm hoping for some clarity.
Hey there, I've been trying to reset my password for a few hours now, but the link just isn't coming to my email. Can you help me out?
hey, just wondering if the pro plan is like a monthly thing or yearly, and also, I saw something about discounts? what’s up with that?

I’ve been a loyal customer for years, but I've recently faced several issues with your service. The features I used regularly seem to be malfunctioning and it's quite frustrating. I hope you can address these concerns as this has been a disappointing experience.
I've been trying to reach customer support for a week, yet I keep getting automated replies. It's frustrating because I need help with my account, and I thought you valued your customers.
I have paid for the premium service, yet I am still unable to access the additional features promised. This is quite frustrating.
The app crashes every time I try to save a photo. It's really frustrating.
I tried to update the app, but it keeps crashing when I hit install. Like, it's not even downloading. Maybe it's just my phone? Need help figuring this out.

It's quite frustrating because I want to update my account with a new photo, and it just keeps failing. I checked my internet connection and even restarted my phone, but it still doesn't work.
Could you please tell me if the subscription fees are charged on a monthly or yearly basis? I seem to be confused.

I was wondering if there might be a possibility for an offline version of your application in the near future, as having a cloud-only option can be quite limiting for some users, particularly those in areas with unreliable internet connectivity. Any insights on this would be greatly appreciated!

I've been charged for the annual subscription but I only intended to sign up for the monthly plan. Could you please look into this and provide a refund for the difference? I really would appreciate your assistance with this issue.
I ordered a product two weeks ago, and I have yet to receive any updates on my delivery status. Could you please provide assistance?
